//: Curated Gunflint Trail hikes. Edit this list, then run ./build-trails.sh to regenerate trails.json.
//kind: 'way' matches all path segments with this name; 'relation' pulls an OSM route relation.
//osm_name: OSM name to match (defaults to name). 'trailhead' optional [lat, lon] override.

trails.name: Magnetic Rock Trail
trails.blurb: Out-and-back past glacial erratics to a 25-foot magnetic monolith that deflects a compass. Open, rocky, and burned-over in stretches with big sky views.

trails.name: Honeymoon Bluff Trail
trails.blurb: Short, steep stair-climb to a bluff overlooking Hungry Jack and West Bearskin Lakes. A classic sunset spot near the Clearwater Road.

trails.name: Caribou Rock Trail
trails.blurb: Ridge-top overlooks of Bearskin, Duncan, and Moss Lakes. Turn around at the first vista or push on toward Stairway Portage.

trails.name: South Lake Trail
trails.blurb: Steep access spur that climbs to the Border Route Trail and the cliffs above South Lake on the Canadian border. Short but a real workout.

trails.name: Centennial Trail
trails.blurb: Interpretive loop through the 1999 blowdown and regrowth near the Gunflint Ranger Station, with boardwalks over wetland.

trails.name: Border Route Trail
trails.blurb: Rugged 65-mile ridgeline route along the Canadian border, linking cliff-top lake overlooks across the highlands. Best sampled in day sections.

trails.name: Kekekabic Trail
trails.blurb: Remote 40-mile wilderness traverse from the Gunflint Trail west toward Ely, deep into the Boundary Waters backcountry.

trails.name: Eagle Mountain Trail
trails.blurb: The path to Minnesota's highest point (2,301 ft), passing Whale Lake through boreal forest and rock. Reached by forest road (The Grade) off the Gunflint Trail.

trails.name: Pincushion Mountain Loop
trails.blurb: Network of loops on the Sawtooth ridge above Grand Marais, with a short spur to a granite dome overlooking Lake Superior.
